boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: AUTH-ZEN-080 exactly matches site Z-12, protocol P7.2, consent C11, activation date 2026-06-28, and enrollment authority before enrollment.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: AUTH-ZEN-080 provides precise activation authority covering site, protocol, consent, date, and enrollment authority.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No escalation required. Exact source boundary is closed by AUTH-ZEN-080.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: All elements closed on 2026-06-28 per STD-ZEN-080-P exact match compliance.

final_answer: The action may proceed. AUTH-ZEN-080 precisely matches the required activation authority for site Z-12, protocol P7.2, consent C11, and the activation date of 2026-06-28, including enrollment authority. FEAS-ZEN-080 is confirmed as a planning artifact and does not substitute for execution authority. The source boundary is closed per STD-ZEN-080-P. All prior workers and adversarial challengers have passed gate checks.
open_blockers: planning artifact vs execution authority boundary intact
